one ethereal piece that changes the line of the whole outfit

venus_conjunction_mars.effect: desire and drive fused, passionate style instinct
venus_conjunction_mars.texture_modifier: adds tactile intensity and sensory boldness
venus_conjunction_mars.colour_modifier: deepens warm tones, adds red-spectrum heat

venus_trine_mars.effect: harmonious blend of beauty and energy
venus_trine_mars.code_addition_avoid: choosing beauty or strength but never both

venus_square_mars.texture_modifier: push-pull between soft and hard textures
venus_square_mars.code_addition_leaninto: use creative tension between soft and strong
venus_square_mars.code_addition_avoid: unresolved style conflicts that look accidental

venus_opposition_mars.effect: opposing pulls between beauty and raw power
venus_opposition_mars.texture_modifier: alternating soft and hard texture choices
venus_opposition_mars.colour_modifier: contrasting palette swings between gentle and bold
venus_opposition_mars.code_addition_leaninto: embrace contrast as a design principle
venus_opposition_mars.code_addition_avoid: committing fully to neither soft nor hard

venus_sextile_mars.effect: easy flow between elegance and energy

venus_conjunction_saturn.effect: beauty refined through discipline and restraint
venus_conjunction_saturn.colour_modifier: darkens and refines palette toward classic tones

venus_square_saturn.effect: tension between desire for beauty and need for restraint

venus_trine_saturn.code_addition_leaninto: quality over quantity as a life principle

venus_opposition_saturn.colour_modifier: warm tones pulled toward cold severity
venus_opposition_saturn.code_addition_avoid: either indulgence or deprivation, find the middle

venus_conjunction_jupiter.effect: beauty amplified by generosity and abundance
venus_conjunction_jupiter.code_addition_leaninto: go generous with quality and colour

venus_trine_jupiter.effect: natural abundance of style and beauty
venus_trine_jupiter.code_addition_avoid: withholding beauty out of false modesty

venus_conjunction_uranus.texture_modifier: drawn to innovative and unusual textures

venus_conjunction_neptune.code_addition_leaninto: dress for the dream version of yourself

venus_square_neptune.effect: confusion between real and idealised beauty
venus_square_neptune.code_addition_leaninto: ground your dreams in quality basics
venus_square_neptune.code_addition_avoid: buying fantasy pieces that never get worn

moon_square_saturn.effect: tension between emotional needs and self-discipline

moon_conjunction_venus.code_addition_avoid: ignoring your emotional response to clothing

sun_conjunction_saturn.code_addition_avoid: frivolous choices that undermine your authority

sun_square_saturn.texture_modifier: oscillation between ambition and restraint in fabrics
sun_square_saturn.colour_modifier: tension between bold and restrained palette
sun_square_saturn.code_addition_leaninto: dress through limitations, not around them

mars_conjunction_saturn.code_addition_leaninto: dress for enduring power, not flash

mars_square_saturn.effect: frustrated energy, blocked action expressed through style
mars_square_saturn.texture_modifier: tension between heavy and light fabrics
mars_square_saturn.code_addition_avoid: dressing in defeat or giving up on style

ascendant_conjunction_venus.effect: beauty as first impression, effortless attractiveness
ascendant_conjunction_venus.code_addition_leaninto: your first impression IS beauty, lean into it

ascendant_square_venus.effect: tension between true beauty and projected image
ascendant_square_venus.texture_modifier: disconnect between chosen and ideal textures
ascendant_square_venus.colour_modifier: palette mismatch between comfort and projection
ascendant_square_venus.code_addition_leaninto: align your outward style with inner beauty
ascendant_square_venus.code_addition_avoid: projecting an image that does not match who you are

ascendant_trine_venus.effect: natural harmony between beauty and presentation

venus_trine_neptune.code_addition_avoid: purely practical dressing that ignores beauty

fire_dominant.palette_bias: warm tones, high contrast, reds, oranges, golds

earth_dominant.palette_bias: earth tones, warm neutrals, greens, browns, creams

air_dominant.palette_bias: light cool tones, pastels, blues, lavenders, varied palette

water_dominant.palette_bias: cool deep tones, blues, purples, silvers, iridescent

cardinal_dominant.palette_bias: clean bold colours, decisive palette choices
